overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk indoor black market bazaar from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit clothing stalls, digital mannequins with advertisement screens, and various NPCs browsing goods in a dystopian underground market setting with teal and orange neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market entrance with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the market entrance past various stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: standing near a counter looking at merchandise

entered.detail: large circular red neon sign with BHIRT text hanging from ceiling
concrete counter with blue digital menu displays and steam rising
large industrial concrete support pillar with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market entrance illuminated by red and teal neon lights. The BHIRT sign hangs prominently overhead while various market stalls line the sides. NPCs are scattered throughout browsing goods, and the camera moves steadily forward through the narrow enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: clothing boutique with leather jackets and digital mannequins

events.description: approaching the clothing stall with PAY HERE counter and leather jacket displays

agents.ego_description: moving past the clothing displays and digital mannequins toward the payment counter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the PAY HERE counter attending the shop

entered.detail: concrete counter with bright teal PAY HERE neon signage
mannequins with digital advertisement screens displaying faces instead of heads
circular neon sign reading LEATHER JACKETS in pink and blue

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a clothing boutique section featuring a prominent PAY HERE counter with teal neon lighting. Digital mannequins with advertisement screens for faces stand on the left, while leather jackets hang on display. A vendor attends the counter as the camera moves past the merchandise.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back corridor with LED floor strips and clothing racks

events.description: entering darker corridor illuminated primarily by green LED floor strip lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow back corridor between clothing racks and storage boxes

notable_agents.action: shopper wearing a hat browsing clothing on a metal rack

entered.detail: bright green neon LED strip running along the floor edge
metal clothing racks with various jackets and garments hanging
cardboard boxes stacked against the wall in the back area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow back corridor where the lighting shifts to prominent green LED strips along the floor. Clothing racks line both sides with various garments, and cardboard boxes are stacked against the walls. A shopper browses the racks as the camera moves through this more confined storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area with blue screen displays and mannequins

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into wider market area with stacked blue error screens

agents.ego_description: moving through the open market area past blue screen displays and groups of shoppers

notable_agents.action: person crouching near a green dumpster looking at items on the ground
group of shoppers walking ahead through the market

entered.detail: stack of monitors displaying blue error screens and system messages
white mannequins standing on concrete display platforms
large green industrial dumpster with items scattered nearby

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider market area featuring distinctive stacks of blue error screens on the right side. White mannequins stand on platforms to the left near a green dumpster where a person crouches. The space feels more open than the previous corridor, with scattered groups of shoppers moving through the neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk bazaar that transitions from a crowded entrance into a confined storage corridor before opening into a wider market plaza. It begins under the red and teal glow of a BHIRT sign, moving steadily forward through a narrow enclosed space lined with market stalls and browsing NPCs. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a clothing boutique featuring a teal-lit pay counter and digital mannequins with advertisement screens for faces. The path then narrows into a back corridor where the lighting changes to green LED strips along the floor, passing by stacked cardboard boxes and clothing racks in a confined storage area. Finally, the space expands into a wider market area characterized by stacks of blue error screens and white mannequins on platforms near a green dumpster.
